---
roa-num: 646.GN-FY-XXX
submitted-to:
  person: First Last, Title
  association: Group or Division Name
cover-title:
  line1: Title Line 1
  # Including `line2` is optional; set to `false` if not needed
  line2: false
purpose: Brief statement specifying purpose of the ROA
lab-dates:
  from:
    day: 1
    month: 1
    year: 9999
  to:
    day: 1
    month: 1
    year: 9999
methods: Sample preparation and/or instrumental methods used
controls-used: Control samples used
quality-docs: Applicable quality manuals and technical procedures
# Optional metadata begin -----------------------------------------------------
# The following should be specified only if applicable; set to `false` if not needed
srms: false
constituents: false
assigned-value:
  value: false
  uncertainty: false
  # `units` should be specified by their common name (e.g., ppm, ppb, percent, or %)
  units: false
exp-date:
  day: false
  month: false
  year: false
collaborators: false
agreements: false
approvals: false
copies-to: false
# Optional metadata end -------------------------------------------------------
prepared-by:
  - name: Brandon LeBlanc
    title: Physical Science Technician
reviewed-by:
  - name: Reviewer Name
    title: Reviewer Title
---

# Introduction

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

# Traceability Statement

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

# Experimental

## Safety

Hazard Reviews.

## Materials

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

## Sample Preparation

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

## Equipment and Instrumentation

* Instrument/Equipment 1
* Instrument/Equipment 2
* Instrument/Equipment 3

## Instrumental Methods

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

## Quantitative Methods

### Statistical Analysis

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

### Homogeneity Analysis

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

### Stability

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

# Results and Discussion

## Value Assignment of Lot Standards

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

### Analysis of Previous Lot Standards

{{< lipsum 3 >}}

## Value Assignment of Samples

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

## Uncertainty Assessment

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

# Disposition of Cylinders

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

# Data Storage

* Notebook 1
* File 1
* File 2

{{< pagebreak >}}

# References

::: {#refs}
:::
